title: SRS (Social Reputation Score)
description: Track your live Social Reputation Score across locations and channels with a single, always-updated health indicator.

title: Peer Benchmarking
description: Compare your reputation performance with similar brands in your category to spot gaps and opportunities faster.

title: Social Reputation Dashboard
description: Monitor SRS, review trends, and outlet performance in one live dashboard built for fast, confident decisions.

title: Quarterly Reports
description: Generate executive-ready quarterly reputation reports with trend summaries, wins, and priorities for the next cycle.

title: Review Responses
description: Manage and publish response workflows quickly with approval controls, templates, and unified review handling.

title: Conversational AI (Elara)
description: Elara drafts context-aware responses, adapts tone to your brand, and keeps every conversation timely and consistent.
